data.name: richTextBox1.Text
data.value: Reliance Digital is a leading Indian electronics retail chain, part of the Reliance Industries conglomerate. It offers a wide range of consumer electronics, including smartphones, laptops, home appliances, and gadgets. Known for its large presence across India, Reliance Digital combines online and offline shopping experiences, providing customers with easy access to the latest technology and top brands. The stores are designed to deliver a hands-on shopping experience, with knowledgeable staff to assist in product selection.
